summary: Iteration 8 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: 1) Client invitation flow (POST /api/clients/invite), 2) Complete registration with token (POST /api/auth/complete-registration), 3) Resend invitation (POST /api/clients/resend-invite/{client_id}), 4) Fees/Onorari CRUD (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/clients/{client_id}/fees), 5) Fees summary (GET /api/clients/{client_id}/fees/summary), 6) Certificate upload and management (POST /api/certificates/upload, GET /api/certificates, DELETE /api/certificates/{cert_name}), 7) Document signing (POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/sign), 8) Frontend: Invite Client button and dialog in CommercialDashboard, 9) Frontend: Tab Onorari in ClientDetail page with summary cards and CRUD, 10) Frontend: Improved ClientDashboard with welcome banner and two-column layout, 11) Frontend: CompleteRegistration page at /complete-registration, 12) Frontend: SignaturesPage at /admin/signatures

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: ✅ API Health Check - Fiscal Tax Canarie API accessible
✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Successfully invites new client with email
✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Works with email only (no full_name)
✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Rejects duplicate email with 400 error
✅ POST /api/clients/invite - Requires authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated)
✅ POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Returns 400 for invalid token
✅ POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Validates password requirements
✅ POST /api/clients/resend-invite/{client_id} - Resends invite to pending client
✅ POST /api/clients/resend-invite/{client_id} - Returns 404 for invalid client
✅ POST /api/clients/{client_id}/fees - Creates new fee with all fields
✅ GET /api/clients/{client_id}/fees - Returns list of fees
✅ GET /api/clients/{client_id}/fees/summary - Returns summary with total, total_paid, total_pending, counts
✅ PUT /api/clients/{client_id}/fees/{fee_id} - Updates fee status and paid_date
✅ DELETE /api/clients/{client_id}/fees/{fee_id} - Deletes fee and verifies removal
✅ GET /api/certificates - Returns list of certificates (empty for new user)
✅ POST /api/certificates/upload - Validates file requirement (422 without file)
✅ DELETE /api/certificates/{cert_name} - Returns error for non-existent certificate
✅ POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/sign - Validates certificate requirement
✅ Frontend: 'Invita Cliente' button visible in CommercialDashboard
✅ Frontend: Invite dialog opens with email and name inputs
✅ Frontend: 'Invia Invito' button in invite dialog
✅ Frontend: 'Firma Digitale' button navigates to /admin/signatures
✅ Frontend: SignaturesPage shows 'Certificati di Firma Digitale' section
✅ Frontend: 'Carica Certificato' button opens upload dialog
✅ Frontend: Certificate upload dialog has name, file, and password inputs
✅ Frontend: 'Onorari' tab visible in ClientDetail page
✅ Frontend: Fees tab shows summary cards (Totale Pagato, In Attesa, Totale Generale)
✅ Frontend: 'Nuovo Onorario' button opens fee form dialog
✅ Frontend: Fee form has description, amount, due_date, status inputs
✅ Frontend: CompleteRegistration page loads at /complete-registration?token=xxx
✅ Frontend: CompleteRegistration shows password, confirm password, full name inputs
✅ Frontend: CompleteRegistration shows error for invalid token
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard shows welcome banner with gradient
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard shows 4 stat cards (Scadenze Urgenti, Documenti, Buste Paga, Completate)
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard has two-column layout (Scadenze Imminenti + Ultimi Documenti)
✅ Frontend: ClientDashboard 'I Miei Dati' tab with NIE, NIF, CIF, IBAN fields
critical_code_review_comments: Email invitation uses Brevo for actual email sending - requires valid BREVO_API_KEY
Certificate upload requires actual .p12 file with valid password for full testing
Document signing requires pyHanko library and valid certificate
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during API tests - automatically cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features fully implemented and tested. Client invitation flow works: commercialista invites client via email, client receives link to /complete-registration?token=xxx, completes registration by setting password. Fees (Onorari) management is complete with CRUD operations and summary. Digital signature requires actual .p12 certificate file for full testing. Email notifications use Brevo API. ClientDashboard has improved UX with welcome banner and two-column layout showing upcoming deadlines and recent documents.

endpoints: POST /api/clients/invite - Creates pending client and sends email invitation
POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Client sets password with token

frontend: Summary cards (Totale Pagato, In Attesa, Totale Generale)
Storico Onorari list with mark as paid, edit, delete actions
New fee dialog with description, amount, due_date, status, notes
Certificate upload dialog with name, file, password
Sign button on PDF documents in ClientDetail
digital_signatures.note: Requires actual .p12 certificate file for complete end-to-end testing

features: Two-column layout for Scadenze Imminenti and Ultimi Documenti
'I Miei Dati' tab with complete profile fields (NIE, NIF, CIF, IBAN, etc.)
